rule: Keywords uppercase, identifiers lowercase; one clause per

rule: Aliases are words, not letters: orders

rule: Beyond two levels of nesting, restructure as

rule: Every JOIN carries its condition explicitly; implicit

rule: Magic constants get a comment or
why: B's hardcoded-literal bans (bullets 5, 13) cover the same magic-number concern
